scripts.setup:secrets: wrangler secret put DATABASE_URL --env production && wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET --env production && wrangler secret put MINIO_ACCESS_KEY --env production && wrangler secret put MINIO_SECRET_KEY --env production
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply my-database --local --env development
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply my-database --env production --remote
